message:
feat: spectral fingerprinting via FFT for agent classification (wa-283h4.9)

Cooley-Tukey radix-2 FFT (no external deps), Hann windowing, PSD
computation, peak detection with quality factor Q, spectral flatness
(Wiener entropy), and 4-class agent classification (Polling/Burst/Steady/
Idle). Includes SampleBuffer circular ring, SpectralMonitor per-pane
tracker, and SpectralConfig with serde. 41 tests including 6 proptest
properties (determinism, flatness bounds, power non-negativity, zero-idle,
scaling invariance, PSD non-negativity).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
